T0120.title: Pregnant-Woman Lead
T0120.definition: In fraud scenarios, refers to pregnant women, who often have more free time and are targeted by scammers with fake work-from-home opportunities like data entry. These scams require upfront 'material fees' or 'membership fees' for promised income that never materializes.
